recommendations.title: Clinical
recommendations.overview: A psychiatrist tries to put her life back together after a violent attack by seeking to repair the life of a new patient, but he has his own terrifying history.

recommendations.title: New Gods: Nezha Reborn
recommendations.overview: While living as an ordinary deliveryman and motor racing fan, Nezha encounters old nemeses and must rediscover his powers to protect his loved ones.

recommendations.title: Baby Blues
recommendations.overview: On a secluded family farm, a mother suffers a psychotic break due to postpartum depression, forcing the eldest son to protect his sibling from the mother they have always known and loved.

recommendations.title: A Bluebird in My Heart
recommendations.overview: An ex-con's attempts to live a quiet life are derailed when the daughter of the woman sheltering him is the victim of a vicious attack.

recommendations.title: Manchester by the Sea
recommendations.overview: After his older brother passes away, Lee Chandler is forced to return home to care for his 16-year-old nephew. There he is compelled to deal with a tragic past that separated him from his family and the community where he was born and raised.

recommendations.title: High Heels
recommendations.overview: After being estranged for 15 years, flamboyant actress Becky del Paramo re-enters her daughter Rebeca's life when she comes to perform a concert.  Rebeca, she finds, is now married to one of Becky's ex-lovers, Manuel. The mother and daughter begin ma

recommendations.title: The Legend of the Nahuala
recommendations.overview: Leo San Juan, an insecure child of nine years old, lives eternally frightened by horror stories that Nando tells his older brother. Within these stories it is 'The Legend of Nahuala', according to which, an old abandoned Casona is possessed by the sp

recommendations.title: Birdemic 2: The Resurrection
recommendations.overview: A platoon of eagles and vultures attack Hollywood, California. Why did the eagles and vultures attack? Who will survive?

recommendations.title: Becky
recommendations.overview: A teenager's weekend at a lake house with her father takes a turn for the worse when a group of convicts wreaks havoc on their lives.

recommendations.title: The United States of Leland
